jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Fyers
jsonLd.description:
Fyers is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
